result.stdout:
Usage: font-generator -f <FILENAME> -s <SIZE>

ABOUT
This tool generates an font file which can be used by the Arqanore framework. This tool uses the application fontbm to generate the bitmaps and font data and 'packs' that data into a single file in a format is being used by the Arqanore framework.

ARGUMENTS
-f      Name of the font file with extension
-s      Font size as integer. Cannot be lower than 4.
-o      [optional] Output folder of the generated font files. If not provided the working folder will be used.
